metadata.title: Synaply - Koyekola mongongo na AI mpe Bokundoli na ndelo
metadata.description: Bakisa mayele na yo ya lokota na lisalisi ya bokundoli na ndelo oyo ezali na nguya ya AI. Kela milongo ya maloba na yo moko to yekola na milongo ya bato nionso oyo ekabolami.
metadata.keywords: koyekola lingelesi, bokundoli na ndelo, kotonga mongongo, ba flashcards, koyekola lokota na AI, milongo ya maloba, app ya koyekola lokota, koyekola espagnol, koyekola français, koyekola allemand, boyekoli ya lokota, kokanga maloba na motó, boyekoli ya SRS
metadata.og_title: Synaply - Boyekoli ya mayele ya maloba
metadata.og_description: Bakisa mayele na yo ya lokota na lisalisi ya bokundoli na ndelo oyo ezali na nguya ya AI. Yekola noki, kobosana te mpo na ntango molai.
metadata.og_image_alt: Interface ya App ya koyekola lokota ya Synaply AI
metadata.twitter_title: Synaply - Yekola maloba ya sika kozanga mpasi
metadata.twitter_description: Join Synaply mpo na koyeba maloba ebele na kosalelaka bokundoli ya mayele mpe AI.

dashboard.title: Tableau de bord
dashboard.subtitle: Koyekola {target} longwa na {source}
dashboard.community_lists_desc: Tala milongo ya maloba mpe ba playlists ya bato mosusu.
dashboard.ai_practice_desc: Bongisa mongongo na yo na kobongolaka bafraze oyo AI ekeli kotalela likambo moko to molongo na yo ya maloba.
dashboard.manage_words_desc: Tala, luká, bongolá to longolá maloba na kati ya kolekzio na yo.
dashboard.import_error_retry: Tokokaki kobomba liloba na yo ya sika te. Meká lisusu mbala moko!
dashboard.select_topic_error: Pona likambo moko to komá contexte na yo moko.
dashboard.ai_translation_notice: AI ekosalisa na ndimbola mpe fraze ya ndakisa
dashboard.auto_translate: Bongolá mbala moko esika oyo ezali mpamba
dashboard.usage_example: Ndakisa ya kosalela to maloba mosusu
dashboard.delete_confirm: Ozali mpenza na posa ya kolongola liloba oyo?
dashboard.delete_all_confirm: Ozali mpenza na posa ya kolongola maloba na yo NIONSO? Okozonga nsima te.
dashboard.no_words_found: Liloba moko te emonani. Meká liloba mosusu ya koluka to bakisa maloba mosusu!
dashboard.no_words_for_lesson: Maloba moko te emonani mpo na koyekola. Bakisa maloba ya sika na liste na yo liboso!
dashboard.no_words_to_review: Ozali na maloba moko te ya kozongela lelo. Zongá nsima to bakisa maloba ya sika!
dashboard.lesson_complete_desc: Mosala malamu! Ozongeli maloba na yo mpo na lelo.
dashboard.practice_setup_desc: Komá likambo moko mpo na kokela bafraze ya mekano mpo na yo moko!
dashboard.practice_topic_hint: Soki otiki yango mpamba, ekokela bafraze kotalela maloba na yo.
dashboard.footer_help_text: Salisá biso mpo na kobongisa! Kabolá makanisi na yo, lobela mabunga, to senga makambo ya sika:
dashboard.support_desc: Soki olingi app oyo, okoki kusunga bokende na yango.

onboarding.journey_begins: Mobembo na yo mpo na boyebi ya lokota ebandi awa.
onboarding.strategy_desc: Mpo na kozwa litomba mingi na Synaply, tokopesa yo mibeko oyo ya pete:
onboarding.step1_desc: Bakisa soki maloba 100 oyo etali likambo moko (ndakisa: Mombongo to Mibembo) mpo na kotonga contexte ya makasi.
onboarding.step2_desc: Yekolá maloba oyo na nzela ya kozongela mokolo na mokolo tii ekokota na mongongo na yo.
onboarding.step3_desc: Kende na Mekano ya AI mpo na kosalela maloba na yo ya sika na bafraze ya mobimba mpe na makambo ya solo.

dashboard.generate_ai_title: Kela liste ya maloba na AI
dashboard.custom_topic_label: Likambo na yo moko to contexte (optionnel)
dashboard.custom_topic_placeholder: ndakisa: Maloba mpo na liyangani ya mombongo na ntina ya marketing
dashboard.publish_desc: Kabolá kolekzio oyo ya maloba {count} na bato mosusu. Ekomonana na galeri ya milongo ya bato nionso.
dashboard.list_title_placeholder: ndakisa: Maloba ya ntina ya IT
dashboard.list_desc_placeholder: Liste oyo ezali mpo na nini?
dashboard.inline_add_error: Pardon, pesá liloba ya original mpe libongoli
dashboard.save_batch_success: Ebombi malamu maloba {count} na liste na yo!
dashboard.remove_duplicates_error: Pardon, longolá maloba oyo ekozongela liboso ya kobomba.
dashboard.remove_duplicates_publish_error: Pardon, longolá maloba oyo ekozongela liboso ya kopesa.

ai_word_info.error_generic: Pardon! Tokokaki kozwa makanisi ya AI te. Meká lisusu!

public_lists.search_placeholder: Luká milongo na titre to ndimbola...
public_lists.no_lists_desc: Meká koluka ndenge mosusu to bongolá ba filtres ya lokota na yo.
public_lists.load_error: Tokokaki kokotisa milongo ya bato nionso te sikoyo.
public_lists.playlists_no_lists: Milongo ya bato nionso ezali te

detail.added_success: Maloba ebakisami malamu na kolekzio na yo!
detail.added_error: Kobakisa maloba na kolekzio na yo ekweyi.
detail.delete_confirm: Ozali mpenza na posa ya kolongola liste oyo ya bato nionso? Okozonga nsima te.
detail.duplicate_error: Maloba oyo ekozongela ezali na liste. Pardon longolá yango liboso ya kobomba.
detail.words_in_list: Maloba na kati ya liste oyo

profile.terms_welcome: Boyei malamu na Synaply. Na kosalelaka misala na biso, ozali kondima mibeko oyo...
profile.title: Bobongisi ya Profil
profile.leave_empty: Tika mpamba mpo na kobatela mot de passe ya sikoyo
profile.subtitle: Kamba makambo na yo mpe bobongisi ya nkota

best_practice.title: Mayele mpo na kolonga
best_practice.strategy_desc: Mpo na boyekoli ya malamu mpenza, tokopesa yo mibeko oyo ya pete na biteni 3:
best_practice.step1_desc: Bakisa soki maloba 100 oyo etali likambo moko (ndakisa: Mibembo to Mombongo) mpo na kokela contexte.
best_practice.step2_desc: Yekolá maloba oyo na nzela ya kozongela mokolo na mokolo tii ekokota na mongongo na yo.
best_practice.step3_desc: Kende na Mekano ya AI mpo na kosalela maloba na yo ya sika na bafraze ya mobimba mpe na contexte ya solo.

getting_started.title: Ebandeli
getting_started.desc: Synaply ezali esaleli ya nguya oyo esalemi mpo na kosalisa yo oyeba maloba mingi mpe obongisa mayele na yo ya lokota na kosalelaka bokundoli na ndelo mpe intelligence artificielle.
getting_started.step1_desc: Bakisa maloba na maboko to salela AI mpo na kokela milongo kotalela likambo mpe niveau.
getting_started.step2_title: Eteni 2: Mekano ya mokolo na mokolo
getting_started.step2_desc: Salelá Kozongela Maloba mpo na kokanga maloba na motó na kosalelaka algo FSRS.

manual.title: Kokoma na maboko
manual.desc: Komá liloba na lokota oyo ozali koyekola mpe libongoli na yango. Okoki kobakisa maloba mosusu to contexte mpo na kokanga na motó malamu.

auto_translate.title: Auto-translate
auto_translate.desc: Salelá esaleli ya "Auto-translate" mpo na libongoli ya mbala moko na DeepL.

ai_list.title: Kokela liste (AI Word List)
ai_list.desc: Pona niveau (A1-C2) mpe likambo moko, mpe AI (Gemini) ekokela liste ya maloba oyo etali yango mpo na yo, oyo okoki kobakisa na diksionere na yo na klik moko.

ai_insights.title: AI Insights
ai_insights.desc: Mpo na liloba mokomoko, AI ekoki kopesa ba synonymes, ndakisa ya kosalela, mpe mayele ya gramere.

spaced_repetition.title: Bokundoli na ndelo
spaced_repetition.desc: Synaply esalelaka algo FSRS (Free Spaced Repetition Scheduler) mpo na kotala ntango ya malamu ya kozongela liloba mokomoko.
spaced_repetition.step1: Balakisi yo liloba moko na lokota ya ebandeli.
spaced_repetition.step2: Komá libongoli mpe finá Enter to Tala eyano.
spaced_repetition.step3: Soki obosani — finá "Nabosani" mpo na kotala eyano.
spaced_repetition.step4: Algo ekotala lisusu mokolo ya kozongela oyo elandi kotalela eyano na yo.

ai_practice.title: Mekano ya AI: Kobongola bafraze
ai_practice.desc: Esaleli oyo esalisaka na boyekoli ya gramere mpe contexte na kobongolaka bafraze mobimba oyo AI ekeli mpenza mpo na yo.
ai_practice.step1: Pona likambo moko (ndakisa: "Mombongo", "Mibembo") to tika esika yango mpamba.
ai_practice.step2: AI ekokela bafraze 5 na likambo oyo oponi.
ai_practice.step3: Pesa libongoli na yo mpe zwa bandimbola ya mozindo.
ai_practice.step4: AI ekolakisa mabunga mpe ekopesa libongoli ya malamu mpenza na bandimbola.

dictionary_management.title: Kamba diksionere
dictionary_management.search: Koluka: Salelá barre de recherche mpo na kozwa maloba noki na kolekzio na yo.
dictionary_management.sorting: Kotonga: Tala liste ya maloba na yo nionso na likoki ya kolongola yango.
dictionary_management.delete_all: Longolá maloba nionso: Likoki ya kolongola diksionere na yo mobimba na klik moko.

progress.title: Bokende mpe Points
progress.desc: Score na yo (na likolo ya app) elakisaka motángo ya maloba oyo obongoli malamu. Soki score emati mingi, boye okangi maloba mingi malamu!
